issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: setup-centrifugo-server
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required config and a docker run command, but it omits the mandatory flags for token_hmac_secret_key, api_key, and allowed_origins; Response A lacks both the config and docker command entirely.

scenarios.name: publish-chat-message-with-jwt
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets the Centrifugo API and JWT requirements (minor text difference), while Response B uses PubNub and does not satisfy the rubric.
